item.title: Texas’ big health priorities — dementia research, food labeling and ivermectin — have hit roadblocks
item.description: Priorities for Republican leadership last legislative session have either been stuck in the courts or left to linger in the state rulemaking process.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas Democrats look to rally behind their ticket, draw national attention at state convention
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: More Bible stories in public schools, changes to history lessons before Texas education board

item.title: Where is screwworm in Texas? Track cases here.
item.dc:creator: Berenice Garcia

item.title: Judge blocks Biden-era immigration rule hours after Texas AG and Stephen Miller’s group sued DOJ
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Court filings: Unsafe homes and a child death still dog Texas’ foster care system amid improvement
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Judge blocks feds from using immigration database to check voter eligibility
item.description: A federal judge cited Texas’ use of the SAVE database, which flagged several voters who were actually citizens, and said the checks violated privacy and voting rights.
item.dc:creator: Natalia Contreras

item.title: U.S. Supreme Court denies Texas death row inmate’s intellectual disability claim
item.description: Attorneys and experts for both the state and for death row inmate Victor Saldaño agree that he should be allowed to present evidence of his disability to a state criminal appeals court.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Austin-area hospitals denied miscarriage care despite clarification to Texas’ abortion ban, federal complaint alleges
item.description: Lynn Callaway says she was sent home from two hospitals, despite an infection, due to healthcare providers’ fear of the state’s abortion ban.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Elected Officials Directory
item.description: To help Texans know more about their representatives, we’ve gathered the bios, contact information and more for the occupants of the state’s highest offices.

item.title: Government Salaries Explorer
item.description: Review the compensation of hundreds of thousands of state and municipal employees in Texas.

item.title: Texas Public Schools Explorer
item.description: Review enrollment trends, demographics, teacher experience, pay and outcomes for all schools, and more.

item.title: SCOTUS orders Texas court to reconsider man’s 1997 murder conviction
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas college watchdog received nearly 70 complaints, opened one investigation, records show
